response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack engineering experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with demonstrated breadth across TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker. Current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong track record of testable code (TDD, founded Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner), architecture work, and end-to-end ownership. Some gaps exist around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifically, but the core stack alignment and engineering depth strongly justify an interview.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS — direct stack match
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator experience at current role
Deep testing/quality focus: TDD practitioner, authored test frameworks, ran testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentioned; testing framework specifics unclear
Kotlin not listed in skills or employment history (Java present but limited recent use)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less depth in the primary TS/Node ecosystem than tenure suggests

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
